recommendations.title: Wildling
recommendations.overview: A young woman held in captivity discovers the realities of truth and lies in the outside world.

recommendations.title: Waiting for Bojangles
recommendations.overview: A boy and his eccentric parents leave their home in Paris for a country house in Spain. As the mother descends deeper into her own mind, it's up to the boy and his father to keep her safe and happy.

recommendations.title: Like Mike 2: Streetball
recommendations.overview: Another young boy with 'hoop dreams' finds an old pair of Michael Jordan's sneakers and can suddenly play ball like the greatest player in the world.

recommendations.title: Doraemon: New Nobita's Great Demon - Peko and the Exploration Party of Five
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Nobita is followed by a stray dog on his way home and decides to help it find its original owner with the help of Doraemon. They find out that the dog is actually a prince in its homeland in Africa.

recommendations.title: Forbidden Games
recommendations.overview: Orphaned after a Nazi air raid, Paulette, a young Parisian girl, runs into Michel, an older peasant boy, and the two quickly become close. Together, they try to make sense of the chaotic and crumbling world around them, attempting to cope with death

recommendations.title: A Mermaid in Paris
recommendations.overview: A man rescues a mermaid in Paris and slowly falls in love with her.

recommendations.title: All Quiet on the Western Front
recommendations.overview: When a group of idealistic young men join the German Army during the Great War, they are assigned to the Western Front, where their patriotism is destroyed by the harsh realities of combat.

recommendations.title: Earwig and the Witch
recommendations.overview: A headstrong orphan discovers a world of spells and potions while living with a selfish witch.

recommendations.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
recommendations.overview: A young boy wins a tour through the most magnificent chocolate factory in the world, led by the world's most unusual candy maker.

recommendations.title: Diary of a Lost Girl
recommendations.overview: Thymian Henning, an innocent young girl, is raped by the clerk of her father's pharmacy. She becomes pregnant, is rejected by her family, and must fend for herself in a harsh, cruel world.
